title: chonemorpha coriacea
intro: Chonemorpha coriacea, also known as the "Queen of the Night," is a flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Chonemorpha coriacea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Chonemorpha coriacea is often prepared as a herbal tea or extract, and its leaves and flowers can be used to create a range of herbal preparations.
